message:
feat(rgc): expand planning track with scope validation, milestone gating, and risk acceptance ledger

Extends the rgc_planning_track module with:
- Scope contract validation: verify scope snapshot completeness, detect
  missing milestone entries, and emit structured validation events
- Milestone gatebook: gate evaluation with pass/fail/skip semantics and
  dependency chain validation across milestones
- Risk acceptance ledger: structured risk entry tracking with severity
  classification, acceptance criteria evaluation, and audit trail
- Wave handoff matrix: validate wave transition prerequisites and emit
  coordination dry-run reports
- Deterministic artifact emission for all four planning surfaces

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
